title: Lights at the Christmas Market
synopsis: A winter evening at the Christmas market fills a town square with light and warmth.
sentences: On a cold December evening, Isla's family went to the Christmas market in the town square.
Strings of lights hung above the stalls like bright stars.
People walked slowly between the wooden booths with scarves wrapped around their necks.
One stall sold candles, another sold cakes, and another sold little toys made of wood.
Isla held a cup of hot chocolate with both hands to keep warm.
A choir began to sing near the large tree in the centre of the square.
The voices drifted through the cold air and made everyone stop for a moment.
Isla's father bought roasted nuts in a paper cone.
Her mother chose a small decoration for the living room window.
The market felt busy, but also peaceful under the lights.
When they finally walked home, the music still seemed to follow them.
Isla thought winter felt kinder when the town glowed like that.
